top.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
top.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.

top.title: Hezbollah rejects renewed ceasefire agreed by Israel and Lebanon
top.summary: The United States announced the ceasefire agreement on Wednesday night following a fresh round of talks.

top.title: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
top.summary: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.

top.title: The ancient trick making food waste useful and tasty
top.summary: Instead of throwing away byproducts of food processing, fermentation is making them valuable.

top.title: Mark Zuckerberg's longest-serving employee on AI, jobs - and her boss
top.summary: Naomi Gleit has weathered many controversies at Meta, but remains in what she tells the BBC is her "dream job".

top.title: AI needs a 'brake pedal', warns Anthropic co-founder
top.summary: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.
